notes: Full roster: 12 C-suite + 60 domain agents across all 16 bounded contexts. Every agent is a security principal (see 10_security_architecture). authorityLevel maps to 06_autonomy_authority_matrix (AM-xx referenced where applicable). modelBinding.gateway is always 'model_gateway' (no direct vendor calls; see 11). All agents inherit these BASE guardrails implicitly: ['authenticated_authorized_logged','respect_authority_matrix','no_unregistered_tools','honor_kill_switch','cite_provenance','no_fabricated_sources']. Per-agent 'guardrails' lists only agent-specific additions. All agents inherit base auditHooks ['AgentDecisionMade'] plus those listed.

agents.name: CEO Agent
agents.mission: Set strategy and OKRs, allocate capital across the portfolio, arbitrate cross-functional tradeoffs.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate to human board for capital above threshold, irreversible pivots, or unresolved C-suite dissent.

agents.name: CFO Agent
agents.mission: Own financial strategy, capital structure, runway, and the integrity of financial decisions.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate any money movement above cap, covenant risk, or forecast confidence below threshold.

agents.name: COO Agent
agents.mission: Run operating cadences, translate strategy into execution, own cross-context throughput and SLAs.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate systemic SLA breaches and resource conflicts that cross venture boundaries.

agents.name: CTO Agent
agents.mission: Own technical strategy, architecture standards, and engineering risk.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate platform-level architecture changes and unacceptable security risk.

agents.name: CPO Agent
agents.mission: Own product strategy, roadmap prioritization, and JTBD-grounded opportunity selection.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate pricing, sunset, and pivots affecting customers or revenue materially.

agents.name: CMO Agent
agents.mission: Own demand generation strategy, brand, and marketing-mix allocation within lawful-growth constraints.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate spend above cap, new data-use categories, and brand-risk creative.

agents.name: CRO Agent
agents.mission: Own revenue strategy across sales and expansion within approved pricing and legal policy.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate non-standard legal/pricing terms and discounts above threshold.

agents.name: CCO Agent (Customer)
agents.mission: Own customer experience, retention strategy, and service quality.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate refunds above cap, vulnerable-customer programs, and systemic dissatisfaction.

agents.name: CDO Agent
agents.mission: Own data strategy, governance, metric canonicalization, and decision-data trust.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate board-KPI redefinitions and data-residency/transfer decisions.

agents.name: CISO Agent
agents.mission: Own security posture, risk acceptance, and safe-autonomy controls.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate critical risk acceptance and any kill-switch deactivation to human security owner.

agents.name: CLO Agent
agents.mission: Own legal and compliance strategy, contract risk, and regulatory readiness. Never asserts legal certainty.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all legally binding commitments and regulator interactions to qualified human counsel.

agents.name: CHRO Agent
agents.mission: Own the human workforce, the approval-duty roster, and the human-agent collaboration model.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all hiring/termination and HR-sensitive actions to human decision-makers.

agents.name: Product Discovery Agent
agents.mission: Surface opportunities from JTBD signals, score them, and feed the roadmap.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate high-cost or strategy-altering opportunities to CPO Agent.

agents.name: Spec Agent
agents.mission: Turn scored opportunities into approved specs and ADRs with privacy-by-design and accessibility built in.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate specs that introduce new personal-data processing (DPIA screen) or break contracts.

agents.name: Code-Gen Agent
agents.mission: Generate code and tests from approved specs and open pull requests.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate breaking changes, new dependencies, and any scan failure to Code-Review Agent + human owner.

agents.name: Code-Review Agent
agents.mission: Review pull requests for correctness, security, license, and standards compliance before merge.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate security/license findings and any main-branch merge to human engineer.

agents.name: Release Agent
agents.mission: Promote releases through progressive delivery with feature flags and guaranteed rollback.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate high-risk or schema-breaking promotions; auto-rollback on SLO breach.

agents.name: Test-Gen Agent
agents.mission: Generate and run unit, integration, contract, E2E, property, accessibility, performance, and security tests.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate requests to lower coverage or skip a mandatory test category to CTO Agent.

agents.name: Reliability Agent
agents.mission: Own SLOs and error budgets; gate releases on reliability and freeze deploys on budget burn.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate sustained SLO breaches and any freeze-override request to CTO Agent.

agents.name: Incident-Commander Agent
agents.mission: Detect, contain, and resolve incidents; drive blameless postmortems and breach assessment routing.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate Sev1, external comms, and any personal-data incident to CISO + Compliance immediately.

agents.name: ICP/Segmentation Agent
agents.mission: Define ICP and maintain versioned, consent-aware segments for targeting and analysis.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate any segment requiring new lawful basis or sensitive signals to CMO + Compliance.

agents.name: Campaign Agent
agents.mission: Design and launch lawful, consent-respecting campaigns and lifecycle journeys.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate spend above cap, new data-use categories, and any content failing the claim-check.

agents.name: Content Agent
agents.mission: Generate brand-safe, truthful, accessible content grounded in approved knowledge and brand guidelines.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate regulated, comparative, or brand-risk claims to CMO + (if regulated) Compliance.

agents.name: Deliverability Agent
agents.mission: Protect sender reputation and ensure messages reach inboxes while respecting suppression.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate blacklisting events and domain changes to CMO + Security.

agents.name: Attribution Agent
agents.mission: Attribute outcomes to channels and run marketing-mix modeling via the semantic layer.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate canonical-metric changes to CDO; recommend (not decide) budget shifts to CMO.

agents.name: Lead-Routing Agent
agents.mission: Route inbound leads to the right owner/queue using fit and capacity rules.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate routing-policy changes to CRO Agent.

agents.name: Qualification Agent (SDR)
agents.mission: Qualify opportunities using MEDDIC/BANT and enrich with account research.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate strategic-account disqualifications to CRO Agent.

agents.name: Conversational-Sales Agent
agents.mission: Run grounded, value-based sales conversations within approved messaging and pricing policy.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate any binding or non-standard commitment to Deal-Desk; never promise outside policy.

agents.name: CPQ Agent
agents.mission: Configure, price, and quote within approved price books and discount policy.
agents.escalationPolicy: Route any quote exceeding discount threshold or with non-standard terms to Deal-Desk approval.

agents.name: Deal-Desk Agent
agents.mission: Approve or reject non-standard quotes, discounts, and terms as the checker, separate from quote creation.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate beyond-authority discounts and legal-term changes to CRO + Legal.

agents.name: Forecast Agent
agents.mission: Produce pipeline-coverage-reconciled sales forecasts and win/loss analysis.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate methodology changes to CRO + CFO; flag low-confidence forecasts.

agents.name: FP&A Agent
agents.mission: Produce rolling forecasts, budget variance analysis, and scenario plans.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate when variance exceeds approved threshold or data quality is below confidence threshold.

agents.name: Billing Agent
agents.mission: Issue invoices, apply revenue schedules, and manage AR/dunning within deterministic rules.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate manual ledger adjustments, write-offs, and credits above cap.

agents.name: AR/Collections Agent
agents.mission: Manage accounts receivable and dunning, recover overdue invoices within policy.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate write-offs, external collections, and vulnerable-customer cases to CFO + (vulnerability) CCO.

agents.name: AP Agent
agents.mission: Process accounts payable: match invoices, validate, and prepare payments for maker-checker approval.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate every payment execution, new payee, and above-cap payment to Treasury/CFO maker-checker.

agents.name: Treasury Agent
agents.mission: Manage cash positioning and liquidity forecasting; execute money movement only via approved, capped rules.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all cash transfers and investment actions to CFO maker-checker (human dual-control above cap).

agents.name: Anomaly-Detection Agent
agents.mission: Detect financial anomalies and potential fraud across ledger, payments, and expenses.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate confirmed anomalies to CFO + CISO + Compliance; hold payments pending review.

agents.name: Triage Agent
agents.mission: Classify and route incoming tickets by intent, priority, entitlement, and risk signals.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate safety, legal, vulnerable-customer, and DSAR signals immediately; never downgrade them autonomously.

agents.name: Support Answer Agent
agents.mission: Resolve tickets with RAG-grounded, entitlement-aware answers; escalate on uncertainty.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate ungrounded answers, DSAR/privacy requests, legal/safety/vulnerable-customer signals, and high-emotion cases immediately.

agents.name: Escalation Agent
agents.mission: Handle escalated cases, coordinate cross-context resolution, and route rights/safety cases correctly.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate legal responses, public commitments, and above-cap compensation to CCO + relevant C-agent.

agents.name: Customer-Success/Health Agent
agents.mission: Compute customer health, predict churn, and drive proactive retention plays.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate high-value churn risk and above-cap retention offers to CCO + CRO.

agents.name: Voice-of-Customer Agent
agents.mission: Mine conversations and feedback into themes and product/CX signals with provenance.
agents.escalationPolicy: Surface (not decide) high-signal themes to CPO + CCO; escalate emerging safety signals to Compliance.

agents.name: Data-Product Agent
agents.mission: Register and maintain contracted data products with owners, SLAs, lineage, and classification.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate breaking contract changes, reclassification, and cross-border transfers to CDO + Compliance.

agents.name: Semantic/Metrics Agent
agents.mission: Maintain one canonical definition per KPI and serve trusted metrics to all consumers.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate board-KPI changes and breaking metric redefinitions to CDO Agent.

agents.name: Data-Quality Agent
agents.mission: Run data-quality tests and freshness checks; block downstream use on failure.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate quality waivers and persistent failures to CDO Agent; block decision-feeds on stale data.

agents.name: Retrieval/Grounding Agent
agents.mission: Serve provenance-bearing retrieval for RAG; escalate or abstain when provenance is insufficient.
agents.escalationPolicy: Abstain and escalate when no sufficiently-relevant approved source exists; never fabricate.

agents.name: DSAR Orchestrator Agent
agents.mission: Receive, route, and track data-subject requests across every personal-data context to completion.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate legal-hold conflicts, identity-verification ambiguity, and any context failing to confirm fulfilment.

agents.name: RoPA Agent
agents.mission: Generate and maintain the Record of Processing Activities from the data inventory and detect gaps.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate missing lawful basis or inventory gaps to CLO/DPO; block processing until resolved.

agents.name: DPIA Agent
agents.mission: Detect high-risk processing, draft DPIAs, and block go-live until human sign-off.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all DPIA sign-offs and high-risk go-lives to human DPO/CLO.

agents.name: Contract-Review Agent
agents.mission: Review contracts and draft redlines against policy; never executes or asserts legal certainty.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all execution and non-standard terms to human legal counsel.

agents.name: Breach-Response Agent
agents.mission: Assess personal-data incidents for breach thresholds and drive the 72-hour notification clock.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate all regulator/subject notifications to CLO + human counsel; track 72-hour clock.

agents.name: Threat-Detection Agent
agents.mission: Detect threats, prompt-injection, and exfiltration attempts across agent activity and infrastructure.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate global kill-switch activation to human security owner; auto-contain at agent/context scope.

agents.name: Access-Review Agent
agents.mission: Continuously review principal permissions and enforce least privilege by demoting unused grants.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate high-privilege grants to CISO + CHRO; auto-demote stale grants.

agents.name: Supply-Chain/SBOM Agent
agents.mission: Generate SBOMs, scan dependencies/containers, and block releases on critical findings.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate critical-CVE risk acceptance and license waivers to CISO + CTO.

agents.name: Red-Team Agent
agents.mission: Adversarially probe agents and systems for prompt-injection, exfiltration, and control gaps.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate confirmed gaps to CISO; production money/PII probes require human approval.

agents.name: Model-Ops Agent
agents.boundedContext: AI Model Operations and Agent Platform
agents.mission: Manage model registry, task-profile bindings, and gateway routing with fallbacks.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate production base-model promotions and authority uplifts to CTO + CISO.

agents.name: Eval Agent
agents.boundedContext: AI Model Operations and Agent Platform
agents.mission: Run capability, safety, grounding, and fairness evals; gate model/prompt promotion.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate threshold changes and eval waivers to CTO; block promotion on safety/fairness failure.

agents.name: Tool-Governance Agent
agents.boundedContext: AI Model Operations and Agent Platform
agents.mission: Govern the tool registry: schemas, permission scopes, and side-effect classification.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate money/PII/irreversible tool registrations and scope expansions to Security + CISO.

agents.name: Prompt-Optimization Agent
agents.boundedContext: AI Model Operations and Agent Platform
agents.mission: Improve prompt templates under version control, validated by evals before any rollout.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate production prompt rollouts to Model-Ops + Eval Agent; significant-decision prompts to CLO.

agents.name: Knowledge-Curation Agent
agents.mission: Ingest and curate knowledge artifacts with provenance for retrieval grounding.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate unverified external sources to Source-Approval Agent before indexing.

agents.name: Source-Approval Agent
agents.mission: Vet and approve knowledge sources, verifying external citations are real and authoritative.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate regulated/medical content and authoritative-source designations to human SME + Compliance.

agents.name: Freshness Agent
agents.mission: Track artifact freshness and deprecate stale knowledge so it leaves retrieval immediately.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate regulated-content freshness extensions to Source-Approval Agent + Compliance.

agents.name: Orchestration Agent
agents.mission: Execute defined durable workflows and route approval requests; cannot redefine workflows.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate stuck workflows past timeout and any request to bypass an approval step.

agents.name: Experiment-Design Agent
agents.mission: Design pre-registered experiments with hypotheses, primary metrics, and guardrail metrics.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate pricing/legal/vulnerable-cohort experiments to CPO + Compliance.

agents.name: Analysis Agent
agents.mission: Analyze experiment results via the semantic layer with fixed analysis plans; auto-abort on guardrail breach.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate analysis-plan changes to CDO; auto-abort and alert on guardrail breach.

agents.name: Growth-Loop Agent
agents.mission: Operate growth loops and ship validated winners within guardrails and authority limits.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate pricing/legal/vulnerable-cohort ships to CPO + Compliance.

agents.name: Sourcing Agent
agents.mission: Source and evaluate vendors against requirements, cost, and open-source/exit-path policy.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate vendor selection, above-cap spend, and lock-in contracts to COO/CFO.

agents.name: Vendor-Risk Agent
agents.mission: Assess vendor security and privacy risk; require DPA and subprocessor registration before onboarding.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate PII-processor and high-risk-tier onboarding to CISO + Compliance.

agents.name: Vendor-Contract Agent
agents.mission: Manage vendor contracts and renewals; flag auto-renewals and enforce exit paths.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate contract execution, auto-renewals, and multi-year commitments to Finance/Legal.

agents.name: Onboarding Agent
agents.mission: Run worker onboarding and offboarding tasks, coordinating access lifecycle with Security.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate hiring, termination, and HR-sensitive actions to CHRO + human decision-makers.

agents.name: Duty-Roster Agent
agents.mission: Maintain the approval-duty roster so every approval-required action maps to a named on-duty human.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate coverage gaps and SoD-policy changes to CHRO; never leave an approval unrouted.

agents.name: Access-Lifecycle Agent
agents.mission: Manage worker access grants across the lifecycle, revoking on offboarding within SLA.
agents.escalationPolicy: Escalate high-privilege grants and post-offboarding extensions to CISO + CHRO.
